name: Message/Response Generator
description:
Unfortunately this bot is useless now with the new "Write something for me" feature... thank you for using this bot while it was useful. <3

A bot to help you generate responses to other bots. If you want, you can add a brief description of the character you are talking to and/or yourself, a quick description of what you want the response to be like, and/or what you want to be done in the response, in brackets at the top of your message, before the message a bot wrote.

You can use personas. The bot will act as whatever persona you have selected in the chat.

Please italicize/bold/underline/etc what is italicized/bold/underlined/etc in the source message.

Also I'm aware the "enhance message" feature exists but this is useful when you don't know how to respond.

If something breaks, does not work, or you have other suggestions, please tell me via review so I can try to fix it! :)
creator: matchapoli
